fantasy-fiver.title: Fantasy Fiver Award
fantasy-fiver.meta: Weekly High Score • 14 Winners Per Season
fantasy-fiver.description: Awarded each week of the regular season to the manager with the highest point total.

golden-ticket.title: Golden Ticket Award
golden-ticket.description: Awarded annually to the manager who receives the first overall pick in the draft.

iron-bank.title: Iron Bank Award
iron-bank.meta: Season Points Leader • Total Points Champion
iron-bank.description: Awarded annually to the manager who scores the most total points in the season.

king-east.title: King of the East
king-east.description: Awarded annually to the team that finishes atop the East Division standings.

king-west.title: King of the West
king-west.description: Awarded annually to the team that finishes atop the West Division standings.

punching-bag.title: Punching Bag Award
punching-bag.meta: Most Points Against • Season Long Misery
punching-bag.description: Awarded annually to the manager who suffers the most points against during the season.

reach-around.title: Reach Around Award
reach-around.description: Awarded annually to the manager who pulled off the best trade of the season.

ring-seeker.title: Ring Seeker Award
ring-seeker.description: Awarded to the manager who correctly predicts the actual NFL Super Bowl champion based on their draft‑night selection.
